urdu transliteration text: Abu Fadhal Abbas sa & Sakina sa
english translation text: Iss baat se mehsoos karo kya hai Sakina.Abbas ke honton ka qaseeda hai Sakina.Can you comprehend or fathom who is SakinaAbbas’s lips are in praise, for Sakina
Aaeena-e-Zehra mein jo dekha tera bachpan.Har aks pukaara ke tu Zehra hai Sakina.In Zahra’s mirror, if ever your childhood was viewedEvery reflection would call out ‘You are Zahra!’O Sakina
Jo pyaas ke parcham ki Alamdar hai ab tak.Abbas ki woh pyari Sakina hai Sakina.She who till today is the flag-bearer of the thirstyThe beloved niece of Abbas is Sakina

Jo Mashk mein bhar sakta hai dunya ke samandar.Kaunain mein bas woh tera saqqa hai Sakina.He who could fill the world’s oceans in his water bagIn this world and in the hereafter, he will quench your thirst O Sakina

Daryaaon ke lab nokay qalam choom rahay hain.Maine abhi likha nahi socha hai sakina.The lips of rivers  are kissing the nib of my penAlthough I have not written anything yet, just only thought of Sakina
Rehaan ke Surat woh sar afraaz rahega.Jisne Teri dehleez ko chooma hai SakinaLike Rehan (poet), he too will remain exaltedWhom so ever has kissed your moseleum, O Sakina
Abbas ke honton ka qaseeda hai Sakina.Abbas’s lips are in praise, for Sakina
